title: Trident Void Notifier
description: Plays a Cave Sound when you throw a trident in the void
body:
When you throw a Trident in the End dimension and it falls off the edge into the void it is lost forever.

This mod will not help with that but it will let you know you just lost your precious Trident by playing a spooky Cave Sound effect towards the area where you lost it. Everyone near you can also hear this and will quite possibly mock you for losing your Trident in such an embarrassing way.
